hallucination.rationale: The generated output is not a clinical note but rather a series of repeated thinking/reasoning blocks. The content within those blocks generally reflects the transcript, but there is no actual clinical note to evaluate for hallucination. The reasoning text is largely accurate to the transcript.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely composed of repeated <think> blocks with informal reasoning and never produces an actual clinical note. It completely fails to follow the instruction to generate a structured clinical note.

completeness.rationale: No clinical note was produced. While the thinking blocks reference many transcript details, there is no actual note output capturing the clinical information in a usable format.
missed_items: Plan with all elements (triamcinolone 0.1% ointment details, moisturizing counseling, shower advice, irritant avoidance, Benadryl recommendation, follow-up instructions)

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was produced. The output consists entirely of repeated thinking blocks with no template sections whatsoever.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted as no clinical note was generated.

duplication.rationale: The <think> block content is duplicated extensively — the same reasoning paragraph is repeated over 25 times.
